I lost almost 1k rating in the last 24h because of :
- some terrible rng on draws, like crazy 
- ratio system. 
Even if i lost that much rating, i was actually still 'winning' , at least 2/3 of my games. 
That was very stupid
Then i got 600 rating back so i guess 'its fine' but that's still annoying
If you win as a 2300 vs a 1800 you win almost nothing
But if you lose vs a 3000 you still lose a lot
Even if the rating gap is bigger
And if you randomly lose to a 500 because of pure rng even if he doesnt know how to play cards in order, then you're kinda screwed
